---
title: "Project2"
output: html_document
---

# rmcfs
# identify the set of relevant features that would be used for classification

```{r}


```

# R.ROSETTA
# create and train a rule-based model with the selected features 

```{r}


```

# clustering of model rules
# evaluate and refine your model 

```{r}


```

# VisuNet

```{r}


```

# VisuArc
# isualizes part of the given network and its connections derived from rules

```{r}


```
